Hi Andrea, it is Paulo. It was a real pleasure to meet you at the fair last week. I just wanted to follow up and keep you posted on our conversation. My team loved your itineraries, and we would like to move forward. As promised, I could send you our full rate sheet and organize a short product presentation whenever it suits you. I really think there is a mutual benefit here, and we would love to make Escape Turismo a preferred partner in Portugal. If you agree, we should also talk about a room block and a possible volume agreement for next season. Let us stay in touch. Please call me back this week, and we will take the next step together.

Good afternoon, and thank you for joining our partner webinar. Today we would like to explain how our new preferred partner program works. First, every partner receives an updated rate sheet and access to exclusive deals that are not available to the public. Second, if you book a large volume, we can offer a special volume agreement with better commissions. We strongly recommend that you keep our team posted about your upcoming groups, because we could reserve a room block in advance and guarantee availability. Building a long-term relationship is our main goal, so please stay in touch, and do not hesitate to circle back with any questions. We look forward to growing together.
